e2ePageLoad.description: PerformanceNavigationTiming.duration — full page load wall-clock time including sub-resources (ms)

hydration.description: performance.measure('hydration_duration') — time between hydration_start mark (inline script) and hydration_end mark (useEffect) (ms). 0 means app is not instrumented.

reactMount.description: React Profiler actualDuration for the mount phase of <AppRoot>. 0 means Profiler is not wired up (ms).
